description: Extend validate_ticket() in schema.py with _validate_optional_test_fields() covering test_command (str, shell-metachar regex + bracket regex with parametrize-limit error message), test_pythonpath (str, no leading /), test_timeout_seconds (int, range 5-120). Add import re.

New module test_executor.py implementing run_tests(test_command, workspace, pythonpath='.', timeout_seconds=30) -> dict. Uses shlex.split, subprocess.run with cwd=workspace, PYTHONPATH env extension. Returns {outcome, returncode, stdout_tail (last 500 chars), duration_seconds, error}. Handles TimeoutExpired/OSError -> outcome=error. Module manifest header required.

Add preflight_test_commands(tickets, workspace_root, log) to corpus.py. Runs pytest --collect-only -q per ticket with test_command. HARD CONSTRAINT: captures COMBINED stdout+stderr (NOT stderr only). Three-branch: exit 0 = pass; exit!=0 + ImportError/ModuleNotFoundError in combined = log.warning (defer); exit!=0 + no import pattern = raise RuntimeError. Update module manifest.

Four changes to runner.py: (a) call test_executor.run_tests() after condition.run() and set result['test_execution']; (b) replace hardcoded correctness_method string with detection over scored dimensions ('test-pass-real'->test-execution, 'ac-keyword'->ac-keyword, mixed->mixed); (c) call corpus.preflight_test_commands() from run_eval() after load_corpus(); (d) update module manifest.

Add first-path check at top of correctness.py score function. If result.get('test_execution') is not None: return {score: 1.0 if outcome=='pass' else 0.0, diagnostic: {method: 'test-pass-real', outcome, returncode, stdout_tail (last 200 chars), duration_seconds}, scorer_version: SCORER_VERSION, status: 'scored'}. Existing keyword path unchanged as fallback.

Add test_command field to two ticket.yaml files and update AGENTS.md. r-brief-tier-whole-file: test_command: 'pytest evals/auto/tests/test_apply.py -x -q'. r-trivial-heading-parser: test_command: null. AGENTS.md Known limitations: 3 bullets (parametrize bracket restriction, resume skips preflight, single-viable-ticket-with-test_command).

Author/extend five test files. New: test_test_executor.py (pass/fail/timeout/OSError/no-tests/truncation). New: test_corpus_preflight.py (import-error->warn; bad-path->raise; clean->pass). Extend: test_schema.py (each invalid optional field). Extend: test_correctness.py (first-path/fallback/error-outcome). Extend or create: test_runner.py (test_execution injection; correctness_method label scenarios).
